commitMessage: Reapply "Add R key to reset game from any state"

topics.title: Add keyboard shortcut to reset the game at any time
topics.trigger: Players had no way to restart the snake game mid-session without navigating away or waiting for a game-over screen. A reset shortcut was needed that would work regardless of the current game state.
topics.response:
- In `src/main.ts`, added an early-exit branch in `handleKeyPress` that intercepts the R key before any other input handling and calls `startNewGame()`, making reset available from any state including mid-game, paused, or game-over.
- Also in `startNewGame()`, added an explicit call to hide the pause overlay when a new game begins, preventing a stale "paused" banner from persisting into the fresh session.
- Updated the on-screen instructions in `index.html` to surface the new shortcut to players.
topics.decisions:
- **Universal reset over state-gated reset**: The R key handler fires before the pause and direction-input checks, so it works unconditionally from any game state. A state-gated approach (only allowing reset on game-over, for example) would have been safer against accidental resets but was judged less useful than giving players full control at all times.
- **Clearing the pause overlay on reset**: Rather than relying on callers to clean up UI state before starting a new game, the reset path itself clears the pause banner. This keeps the reset action self-contained and prevents a subtle visual bug where a paused game that is reset would show the new game behind a "Paused" overlay.

recap: Players can now press R at any point during a snake game session to immediately restart, without waiting for a game-over screen or navigating away. The reset works from every state — mid-game, paused, or after losing — and the on-screen instructions were updated to make the shortcut discoverable. A subtle visual bug was also addressed: resetting a paused game now correctly clears the pause overlay, so the fresh session starts with a clean screen.
